use_cases: Photography portfolios and visual galleries with immersive 3D browsing
E-commerce product showcases with cloth-like material effects
Creative agency showcases with infinite scroll animation
Art galleries and exhibition displays with depth-based fade effects
Fashion and lifestyle brand showcases with blur transitions
ai_summary: An immersive 3D photography gallery built with React Three Fiber featuring infinite scroll animation with cloth-like shader material effects. Images float in 3D space with configurable depth-based fade and blur transitions, supporting hover interactions and smooth scroll-driven animations. Designed for media-rich displays like photography portfolios, e-commerce product grids, and creative agency showcases.
